summary: Website/page update: add additional boxed sections under the "About Guru & Associates" area with a new heading and three specific box items.

existing_features.title: Update the About section (frontend/src/components/sections/About.tsx) to include an additional subsection under the existing "About Guru & Associates" content: add a separate heading (English) reading "Guru & Associates is into" placed above a 3-card grid of boxed items styled consistently with the existing "Expert Guidance" feature cards, and ensure the three boxes display these exact titles: (1) "GURU & ASSOCIATE WEALTH CREATOR" (2) "G.P. ASSOCIATE LEGAL ADVISOR" (3) "GURU & ASSOCIATE PRODUCTION , DIRECTOR , FILM".

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a new section under "About Guru & Associates" with boxed items and a separate heading; include boxes for (1) Guru & Associate Wealth Creator, (2) G.P. Associate Legal Advisor, (3) Guru & Associate Production / Director / Film.
